title: Creamy Greek Long Beans Salad
description: A vibrant brunch salad featuring tender Chinese long beans tossed in a tangy Greek yogurt dressing with a touch of cumin and smoked paprika, finished with fresh dill and toasted pine nuts.

ingredients.name: Chinese long beans
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into 4-5 cm pieces

instructions: Wash the long beans under cold water and trim the ends.
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the beans for 3 minutes until bright green and slightly tender.
Drain and immediately transfer the beans to ice water to stop cooking and retain their color.
In a bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, minced garlic, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Add the blanched beans to the dressing and toss gently to coat.
Fold in chopped dill and toasted pine nuts, reserving a little dill for garnish.
If using, sprinkle crumbled feta over the top.
Serve chilled or at room temperature as a refreshing brunch salad.
Enjoy immediately or store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
